page.empty: No memos yet. Write your first one.

input.placeholder: What are you doing right now?
input.shift_enter_hint: Enter to submit / Shift+Enter for newline

weekly.title: Weekly Reflection
weekly.empty_state: No weekly summaries yet. They are automatically generated on Sunday evenings.
weekly.next_summary: The next weekly summary will be generated on Sunday evening

mood_enabled.label: Enable mood input
mood_enabled.description: Choose your mood from 5 levels when adding a memo. Off by default.

reminder.label: Daily Reminder
reminder.description: Receive a notification at the set time to record your action memo (will be activated after batch implementation)

todo_revert.confirm: Revert the TODO completion for this memo?

error.rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.daily_limit: You've reached today's limit (200 memos). Please continue tomorrow.
error.future_date: You can't write to a future date.
error.todo_not_found: The TODO you tried to link was not found.

closing.title: End-of-day reflection
closing.no_memos_hint: Nothing to publish because there are no memos today.

offline.banner: You are offline. Your memos will sync when you're back online.

tag.delete_confirm: Delete this tag? This cannot be undone.
tag.limit_reached: You can create up to 100 tags

progress_rate.label: Progress
progress_rate.requires_todo: Linking a TODO is required to enter progress rate

completes_todo.label: Mark this TODO as completed
completes_todo.tooltip: Checking this will complete the linked TODO when the memo is saved

post_to_team.only_work: Only Work memos can be posted to a team
post_to_team.already_posted: This memo has already been posted
post_to_team.publish_daily: Post today's Work memos to team
post_to_team.no_work_memos_hint: Nothing to post because there are no Work memos today.
post_to_team.publish_daily_success: Today's Work memos have been posted to team

settings.default_team_help: Team automatically selected when creating a Work memo

team_timeline.empty: No Work memos have been posted to this team yet

org_scope.label: 組織に共有
org_scope.no_orgs: 所属組織がありません
org_scope.already_set: 組織スコープ設定済み

audit.empty: 変更履歴はありません
audit.error: 履歴の取得に失敗しました
audit.event_todo_completed: 関連TODO を完了にしました
